requirement_topic.en: Supplier Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) — Importer / Supplier Obligation
requirement_topic.zh: 供应商符合性声明（SDoC）——进口商/供应商义务
requirement_topic.zht: 供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）——進口商/供應商義務

summary.en: Under Part 3 of the Electrical Safety Regulations 2010 (ESR 2010), any person who supplies a controlled electrical device (CED) in New Zealand — including importers and distributors — must hold a Supplier Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) for that device model before supply. The SDoC must: (a) identify the device and supplier; (b) declare the applicable AS/NZS standard(s) with which the device complies; (c) be based on test evidence from a recognised laboratory; and (d) be retained and produced on request by WorkSafe NZ or other enforcement authorities. There is no central NZ product registration database comparable to the Australian EESS; compliance responsibility rests entirely with the NZ-market supplier or importer.
summary.zh: 依据《电气安全法规》2010年（ESR 2010）第3部分，任何在新西兰供应受控电气设备（CED）的人——包括进口商和经销商——须在供应前持有该设备型号的供应商符合性声明（SDoC）。SDoC须：（a）标识设备和供应商；（b）声明设备符合的适用AS/NZS标准；（c）基于获认可实验室出具的测试证据；（d）留存并在WorkSafe NZ或其他执法机构要求时提供。新西兰没有与澳大利亚EESS相当的中央产品注册数据库；合规责任完全由新西兰市场供应商或进口商承担。
summary.zht: 依據《電氣安全法規》2010年（ESR 2010）第3部分，任何在新西蘭供應受控電氣裝置（CED）的人——包括進口商和經銷商——須在供應前持有該裝置型號的供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）。SDoC須：（a）標識裝置和供應商；（b）聲明裝置符合的適用AS/NZS標準；（c）基於獲認可實驗室出具的測試證據；（d）留存並在WorkSafe NZ或其他執法機構要求時提供。新西蘭沒有與澳洲EESS相當的中央產品註冊資料庫；合規責任完全由新西蘭市場供應商或進口商承擔。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Safety Regulations 2010 (ESR 2010), Part 3 — Supplier declaration of conformity
Electricity Act 1992 (NZ) — statutory basis for electrical equipment supply obligations

summary.en: For China domestic supply, mandatory product categories (including certain IT and consumer electronic products) require CCC (China Compulsory Certification) obtained through CNCA-authorised bodies. The certification resides with the product/manufacturer, not solely the importer. For radio-enabled products, SRRC type approval is issued to the radio module or device. There is no separate SDoC obligation analogous to NZ ESR 2010 Part 3 in the Chinese regulatory system.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内供应，强制性产品类别（包括特定IT和消费电子产品）须通过CNCA授权机构取得CCC（强制性产品认证）。认证归属于产品/制造商，而非仅进口商。对于无线产品，SRRC型号核准证颁发给无线电模块或设备。中国监管体系中没有类似于新西兰ESR 2010第3部分的独立SDoC义务。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內供應，強制性產品類別（包括特定IT和消費電子產品）須通過CNCA授權機構取得CCC（強制性產品認證）。認證歸屬於產品/製造商，而非僅進口商。對於無線產品，SRRC型號核准證頒發給無線電模組或裝置。中國監管體系中沒有類似於新西蘭ESR 2010第3部分的獨立SDoC義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/CQC, applicable product categories)
SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT) — for wireless devices
MIIT NAL — Network Access License for terminal equipment

gap.en: NZ requires the importer or local supplier to issue a model-specific SDoC before supply — this is a NZ-market-specific legal obligation that cannot be fulfilled by Chinese CCC certification or SRRC approval. The SDoC must reference applicable AS/NZS standards and be signed by the NZ-responsible party. Unlike Australia, NZ does not require EESS supplier registration in a public database, but absence of a valid SDoC exposes the supplier to WorkSafe NZ enforcement action.
gap.zh: 新西兰要求进口商或当地供应商在供应前针对特定型号出具SDoC——这是新西兰市场专用法律义务，无法由中国CCC认证或SRRC批准履行。SDoC须引用适用AS/NZS标准并由新西兰责任方签署。与澳大利亚不同，新西兰不要求在公共数据库中进行EESS供应商注册，但无有效SDoC会使供应商面临WorkSafe NZ执法行动。
gap.zht: 新西蘭要求進口商或當地供應商在供應前針對特定型號出具SDoC——這是新西蘭市場專用法律義務，無法由中國CCC認證或SRRC批准履行。SDoC須引用適用AS/NZS標準並由新西蘭責任方簽署。與澳洲不同，新西蘭不要求在公共資料庫中進行EESS供應商註冊，但無有效SDoC會使供應商面臨WorkSafe NZ執法行動。

source.publisher: New Zealand Parliamentary Counsel Office / WorkSafe NZ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Supplier Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) against applicable AS/NZS standards is a mandatory pre-supply obligation under ESR 2010 for controlled electrical devices in New Zealand; CCC and SRRC do not satisfy this obligation; the NZ importer or supplier must issue the SDoC and retain supporting test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 针对适用AS/NZS标准的供应商符合性声明（SDoC）是新西兰受控电气设备依ESR 2010规定的强制性供应前义务；CCC和SRRC不满足该义务；新西兰进口商或供应商须出具SDoC并留存支持性测试证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 針對適用AS/NZS標準的供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）是新西蘭受控電氣裝置依ESR 2010規定的強制性供應前義務；CCC和SRRC不滿足該義務；新西蘭進口商或供應商須出具SDoC並留存支持性測試證據。
